title: QOL Vanilla Plus
description:
smaller swords low fire no particles side shield square cobs
BEST FOR PVP
body:
This pack upgrades your Minecraft experience with a set of sharp, practical visual improvements designed for smoother PvP, cleaner gameplay, and a more polished overall look. It keeps the vanilla style intact while enhancing clarity, visibility, and item readability.

Better Swords  
Your swords get a refined redesign with cleaner edges, improved shading, and a more defined silhouette. They look sharper, feel more modern, and stand out clearly during combat without breaking the classic Minecraft aesthetic.

Low Fire  
Fire is reduced to a minimal, unobtrusive height—perfect for PvP. You keep the visual cue without losing half your screen to flames, giving you better awareness in every fight.

Better Square Cobwebs  
Cobwebs are retextured into cleaner, more defined square patterns. They’re easier to see, easier to identify, and fit more naturally into the blocky world while still looking crisp.

Side Shield  
Your shield moves to the side of the screen, opening up your field of view while still showing enough of the model to feel immersive. It’s a subtle but game-changing improvement for visibility.

Smaller Held Items  
Held items are scaled down for a cleaner first-person view. Tools, weapons, and other items take up less screen space, making your gameplay feel smoother and less cluttered.
